data.title: KI Wall acquired Custom Glass Products, LLC-Wisconsin (CGP-WI) to improve precision and flexibility in glass fabrication.
data.description: KI Wall, a division of leading architectural wall systems and pod solutions provider KI, has completed the acquisition of Custom Glass Products, LLC - Wisconsin (CGP-WI), a glass fabricator based in Wausau, Wisconsin. This strategic partnership aims to enhance KI Wall's capabilities in storefront and glass-intensive wall system applications. The acquisition will bolster precision, flexibility, and reliability in their offerings. The move signifies a commitment to improving fabrication alignment and delivering superior service.

data.title: Invitation Homes (NYSE: INVH) will release Q4 2025 results on Feb 18, 2026, after market close. Conference call on Feb 19.
data.description: Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) announced that it will unveil its financial and operating outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 18, 2026, post-market hours. As the top single-family home leasing and management firm in the U.S., Invitation Homes aims to hold a conference call the next day, February 19, 2026, starting at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. During the call, they will delve into the Q4 results, analyze recent developments, and engage in discussions.

data.title: December 2025 home sales up 14.9% from Nov, 5.0% higher than 2024. Median sales price softens.
data.description: In January 21, 2026, it was reported that home sales in December of 2025 saw a significant increase of 14.9% compared to November and were 5.0% higher than December of the previous year. This marks the sixth consecutive month in 2025 where sales have outperformed those of 2024. Additionally, the median sales price showed a decrease, indicating a softening market. These trends have resulted in a year that closely resembles the real estate market of 2024 across 52 regions.

data.title: Ethereum outlook turns bearish with a 62.5% chance of dropping to $2.5K, yet validator sentiment holds firm for long-term.
data.description: Ethereum is facing bearish sentiments as prediction markets indicate a 62.5% probability of a drop to $2,500. Despite this, validator sentiment remains stable for the long-term.

data.title: Solana (SOL) and Fireblocks aim at enterprise treasury with sub-cent settlement layer, offering gasless transactions and tokenization tools. $15.7B stablecoin ecosystem yields 4-12% against traditional banking's 0.5%.
data.description: The integration of Fireblocks introduces gasless transactions and tokenization tools to the stablecoin ecosystem of Solana (SOL), valued at $15.7 billion. This integration offers the potential for yields ranging between 4-12%, significantly higher compared to the 0.5% yields provided by traditional banking institutions.

data.title: HealthTree Foundation partners with CMS for "Kill the Clipboard" initiative & AI assistance to empower cancer patients. #HealthTech #CancerSupport
data.description: In Salt Lake City on January 21, 2026, HealthTree Foundation, a prominent patient-centered platform offering resources for blood cancer education, support, and research advancement, revealed its participation in the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) Health Tech Ecosystem. This marks a significant milestone for the organization as it joins this prestigious program aimed at fostering innovation in healthcare.

data.title: Large Ethereum holders took advantage of the price decline, but the fear of a drop to $2.7K remains as data suggests a potential sell-off.
data.description: Large financial entities and significant holders of cryptocurrency saw the value of Ethereum drop under $3,000 as a chance to purchase more, despite the possibility of a further decline to $2,700 based on available data.

data.title: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. states 95.98% of 2025 dividends to common shareholders are taxable.
data.description: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. declared that 95.982458% of dividends distributed to common shareholders for the 2025 tax year are categorized as taxable distributions for federal income tax purposes. The tax characteristics of common stock dividends paid per share are as follows: CUSIP: 29670E107, with Ordinary Income, Capital Gain, Ex-Dividend/Record Date, Payable Date, Distribution per Share, Total Non-Qualified and Qualified totaling.

data.title: Homes.com report: 2025 shows national home prices up 1.1% to $380,000, first year-over-year affordability improvement since 2020.
data.description: In a recent report by Homes.com, a leading online residential marketplace owned by CoStar Group, home price trends were analyzed through December 2025. The data indicated a steady increase in home prices, with the nationwide median rising by 1.1% from $376,025 in December 2024 to $380,000 in December 2025. Across major metros and various house types, homebuyers observed median sale prices ranging between $370,000 and $395,000. This signifies a continued trend of moderate home price appreciation, reflecting the current market conditions.

data.title: First American Financial Corp to pay $0.55 per share quarterly dividend on March 16, 2026 to shareholders as of March 9, 2026.
data.description: In Santa Ana, California, First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), a leading provider of title, settlement, and risk solutions for real estate transactions and a digital transformation pioneer in the industry, revealed that its board of directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of 55 cents per common share. This dividend will be disbursed on March 16, 2026, to shareholders listed as of March 9, 2026. First American has solidified its position as an innovator in the sector with this announcement.

data.title: Steak 'n Shake offers Bitcoin bonus to hourly workers, boosting pay with cryptocurrency.
data.description: Steak 'n Shake, a restaurant chain, is increasing its involvement in Bitcoin by offering a boost in pay for its hourly employees, with the amount paid out in BTC.

data.title: Newmark Group will announce Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026, with a conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: A conference call has been set for January 21, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time in New York. Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a prominent commercial real estate advisor catering to major institutional investors and global corporations, will be hosting the call.

data.title: Fulton Financial Corp reports $96.4 million net income for Q4 2025, $0.53 per share, a $1.5 million drop.
data.description: In Lancaster, Pennsylvania, on January 21, 2026, Fulton Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: FULT) announced its financial results. The corporation disclosed a net income available to common shareholders amounting to $96.4 million, translating to $0.53 per diluted share for the fourth quarter of 2025. This represented a decrease of $1.5 million compared to the previous period.
